name: ADAPTIN BIO, INC.
summary: PART I . Our Company The Companys objective is to develop and commercialize products utilizing novel technology that enhances the delivery of drugs and other compounds to the brain and other tissues for a variety of indications. Our novel technology was originally developed by researchers in the Department of Neurosurgery at Duke University and licensed by us in 2023.
